key_supporting_evidence: MRI severe canal stenosis with cord compression/T2 signal change; hyperreflexia; Hoffmann sign; failed PT, gabapentin, NSAIDs, ESI
key_gaps_or_risks: Latest consult lacks explicit ADL impairment statement and weak inpatient site-of-care justification
why: Likely medically necessary, but documentation is not payer-ready for inpatient request
if_additional_documentation_arrives: If surgeon addendum documents gait imbalance/hand dysfunction affecting ADLs and inpatient risk due to OSA/obesity/fall risk, likely approve
complexity_notes: Contradictory exam language across notes; functional loss buried in PT note

requested_service: Elective lumbar fusion for chronic low-back pain
clinical_scenario: Mechanical back pain without clear instability
key_supporting_evidence: Chronic pain >1 year; degenerative changes on MRI
key_gaps_or_risks: No documented instability; no neurologic deficit; conservative therapy incompletely documented; pain/function mismatch
why: Does not meet typical fusion criteria under conservative payer policy
if_additional_documentation_arrives: Only flips if instability, progressive deficit, or exhaustive failed non-operative management is documented
complexity_notes: Common false-positive case for LLMs that over-weight pain language

clinical_scenario: End-stage osteoarthritis with major functional decline
key_supporting_evidence: Severe tricompartmental OA on X-ray; failed NSAIDs/injection/PT; cane use; inability to climb stairs
key_gaps_or_risks: BMI elevated but not an exclusion in provided policy
why: Radiographic disease, symptom severity, and failed conservative treatment are aligned

clinical_scenario: COPD with dyspnea but limited qualifying hypoxemia data
key_gaps_or_risks: No resting/ambulatory sats that meet threshold; nocturnal desaturation study absent
why: Symptoms alone do not satisfy oxygen coverage criteria
if_additional_documentation_arrives: Could become approvable with documented qualifying oximetry/ABG

clinical_scenario: Moderate-to-severe UC flare refractory to standard therapy
key_supporting_evidence: Frequent bloody stools; calprotectin high; steroid-dependent; failed mesalamine and azathioprine
why: Clinical severity supports therapy, but safety prerequisites incomplete
if_additional_documentation_arrives: Likely approve once infectious screening and baseline labs complete

key_gaps_or_risks: No rising tumor markers, no suspicious conventional imaging, guideline mismatch
why: High-cost imaging not supported in asymptomatic low-risk surveillance under policy
if_additional_documentation_arrives: Could change if thyroglobulin rises or suspicious lesions emerge

clinical_scenario: Neuromuscular disease with progression and EMG evidence
key_supporting_evidence: Progressive weakness, areflexia, EMG/NCS supportive, steroid intolerance
why: Objective studies and functional loss support necessity despite note ambiguity
complexity_notes: Tests source hierarchy: EMG > vague note

key_supporting_evidence: Needs two disciplines, can participate 3 hrs/day, family support limited, unsafe for home
why: Meets intensity/benefit criteria for IRF in supplied policy

key_supporting_evidence: BMI >40; diabetes/OSA; supervised weight-management program documented; psych clearance done
why: Clinical indication strong but program/policy prerequisites must be complete
if_additional_documentation_arrives: Likely approve after documented nicotine abstinence window

clinical_scenario: Severe symptomatic aortic stenosis with surgical risk factors
key_supporting_evidence: Echo severe AS, syncope, dyspnea, heart team evaluation, frailty
key_gaps_or_risks: Coronary anatomy summary missing from referral packet
why: High-risk symptomatic valve disease strongly supports intervention
if_additional_documentation_arrives: Packet gap should not overturn if heart-team assessment is complete
